content.query:
SELECT [Move_Primary_key]
,[Unit_Nbr]
,[Facility_Id]
,[Complex_Id]
,[Yard_Id]
,[Carrier_Visit_Key]
,[Event_Type_Id]
,[Move_Kind]
,[From_Location]
,[To_Location]
,[From_Position_Name]
,[To_Position_Name]
,[CHE_Operator_Id]
,[CHE_Id]
,[CHE_Kind]
,[move_time]
,[dist_carry]
,[dist_start]
,[Category_Id]
,[Freight_Kind_Id]
,[pow]
,[ufv_gkey]
,[Year]
,[Month]
,[Week]
,[is_move_window_matched]
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_moves]
 WHERE CHE_Id = '303' AND
 move_time >=  '2026-01-15 04:26:23' AND move_time <='2026-01-15 06:47:57'
